## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Conventional Commit

<!--
Releases are automated from commit messages. Make sure your PR title (or squash
commit) follows Conventional Commits, e.g. `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, `docs: ...`.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (including doctests)
- [ ] Public items are documented
- [ ] Examples/tests use only public, non-personal data
